_comment: FORGE asset registry. Synthetic, modeled on a commercial PL45LM-class turn-mill (CNC vertical machining center / turn-mill). Telemetry rows and thresholds are derived from the AI4I 2020 Predictive Maintenance dataset (CC BY 4.0); see DATA_SOURCES.md. No real OEM data is reproduced.

nameplate.location: Bay 3, Cell A — primary production line

telemetry_source.dataset: AI4I 2020 Predictive Maintenance (UCI id 601, CC BY 4.0)

nominal.label: Nominal production run
nominal.note: Healthy run. Tool wear is elevated (191 min) — close to replacement — which is why a high-torque cut will trip overstrain (see demo).

overstrain_failure.label: Overstrain failure (OSF)
overstrain_failure.note: AI4I overstrain row: tool_wear x torque = 191 x 65.7 = 12549 minNm, over the 11000 minNm L/M overstrain limit. This is the demo threshold trip.

thresholds._rules: Grounded in the AI4I 2020 failure definitions. Each reading is checked on record_measurement; crossing 'alert' raises a spoken + visual alarm, 'warn' raises caution.

spindle_torque.rationale: Torque approaching rated max strains the spindle; combined with tool wear it drives overstrain failure (OSF).

tool_wear.rationale: AI4I tool-wear failure (TWF) occurs in the 200-240 min band. Replace the tool before 200 min.

process_temperature.rationale: Process temperature ceiling before heat-dissipation problems.

rotational_speed.rationale: Excess speed at low torque drives power failure (PWF); spindle rated speed is 1538 rpm.

overstrain_index.rationale: AI4I overstrain failure (OSF) limit is 11000 minNm for L/M-grade product. Checked automatically when spindle_torque is recorded against current tool wear.

maintenance_history.notes: Replaced spindle coolant union seal. Verified drawbar clamp force in spec. Greased X/Y linear guides.
Drawbar disc springs measured at 88% of free length. Logged for trend; within tolerance.
Re-tensioned spindle drive belt. Heat-soak test passed. No bearing replacement required.

open_faults.symptom: Intermittent tool-unclamp delay at station change; operator reports occasional 2-3 s hesitation.
